---
title: "Dessert Match-ups: Part II"
description: |
  Sweets on sweets on sweets
date: '2026-06-22'
image: "cookies.jpg"
categories:
    - Food
format: html
toc: true
lightbox: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
draft: false
---

```{r}
library(here)
source(here("packages.R"))
source(here("functions.R"))

series_filter = 16

data = pollresults(series_filter)
```

```{r}
for (q in unique(data$question)) {
  print(simple_bar_question(data, q))
}
```
